$description: Derived from component CSS + doc page — do not edit by hand; regenerate with `node scripts/build-component-api.mjs`.
name: input
title: Input

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Added select searchable + allow-custom behaviours; restored select-all + summary (usage-driven). Searchable hosts a real text field that type-filters the menu with matched text highlighted (.ds-menu__match / .ds-menu__text) — replaces legacy InputAutocomplete; allow-custom adds a pinned “Add …” row (.ds-menu__item--add / .ds-menu__add-icon) with a custom affix (.ds-menu__affix) — replaces legacy InputCombobox. Summary display mode collapses a multi-select to a count chip (.ds-input__count). New menu sub-classes live in menu.css; the count chip in input.css.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Phase 3 (Mobile): select/multi/combobox open a Bottom Sheet under 768px with value/chip write-back (chips are the Pill component); combobox pins a search Input in the sheet (ds-sheet__search); date/time always native OS pickers (desktop web pattern to follow); keyboard avoidance via visualViewport documented.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Multi-select chips are now the Pill component (ds-pill --sm --green --minimal) — input-local chip styling removed; remove button nests inside the pill. Chevron pinned to the field edge when chips hide the display span.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Phase 2: Select, multi-select with chips + Select All, and searchable Combobox — flat dropdown menu (no elevation), right-hand checkboxes, surface-cyan selected rows, z-dropdown/surface-cyan-hover tokens. Desktop pattern; mobile bottom sheet is Phase 3.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Component CSS extracted to shared assets/css/components/input.css; duplicated ds-btn removed in favour of shared button.css; anatomy rebuilt as deconstructed stack.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Phase 1: text, email, password (eye toggle), search, send, textarea variants. All 5 states. 3 density tiers. Outside label preferred; inside label deprecated with dev warning. Accessibility: aria-invalid, aria-describedby wiring, 16px input font-size. Token references complete.

props.codeProp: type: text | email | password | number | textarea | search | send
leadingIcon — icon name string or #leading slot
trailingIcon — icon name string or #trailing slot
clearable: boolean — renders clear button when field has a value
searchable: boolean — the trigger hosts a real text field that type-filters the menu, matched text highlighted (.ds-menu__match). Replaces legacy InputAutocomplete. Works single + multi (chips).

allowCustom: boolean — when the query isn't an existing option a pinned "Add …" row (.ds-menu__item--add) creates it; created values carry a custom affix. Requires searchable. Replaces legacy InputCombobox. Duplicate guard is case-insensitive; value validation is the consumer's job.
selectAll: boolean — multi-select only. Adds a leading "Select all" row (checked / indeterminate / unchecked) above a divider. Restored (usage-driven: 73 Office uses).
selectAllLabel — label for the select-all row.
summary: boolean — multi-select only. Collapses the field to a single count chip (.ds-input__count — "N selected") instead of individual pills. Restored (usage-driven: 31 Office uses).
